grapes.css: .ft-root{font-family:'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;color:#0f172a;background:#ffffff;line-height:1.5} .ft-wrap{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px} .ft-promo{background:#0070f3;color:#fff;text-align:center;padding:10px 16px;font-size:.8125rem;font-weight:600} .ft-header{background:#ffffff;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:40} .ft-header__inner{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;min-height:68px;flex-wrap:wrap} .ft-logo{font-family:'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:1.25rem;color:#0f172a;text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:-.02em} .ft-nav{display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap} .ft-nav a{color:#64748b;text-decoration:none;font-size:.875rem;font-weight:500} .ft-nav a:hover{color:#0f172a} .ft-header__actions{display:flex;gap:8px} .ft-btn{border:none;border-radius:999px;padding:10px 18px;font-size:.875rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:inherit} .ft-btn--primary{background:#000000;color:#fff} .ft-btn--outline{background:transparent;border:2px solid #000000;color:#000000} .ft-btn--ghost{background:transparent;color:#0f172a} .ft-btn--lg{padding:14px 28px;font-size:1rem} .ft-btn--sm{padding:8px 14px;font-size:.8125rem;width:100%;margin-top:8px} .ft-hero{padding:72px 0;background:linear-gradient(135deg, #f8fafc 0%, #ffffff 100%)} .ft-hero__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;gap:40px;align-items:center} .ft-hero__copy h1{font-family:'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.25rem);line-height:1.1;margin:12px 0 16px;color:#0f172a} .ft-hero__copy p{font-size:1.125rem;color:#64748b;max-width:520px;margin:0 0 28px} .ft-eyebrow{display:inline-block;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.12em;font-size:.6875rem;font-weight:700;color:#0070f3} .ft-hero__cta{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap} .ft-hero__visual{min-height:320px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0070f333,#00000022);border:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-trust{padding:28px 0;background:#f8fafc;border-block:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-trust__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;text-align:center} .ft-trust__item span{font-size:1.5rem;display:block;margin-bottom:6px} .ft-trust__item strong{display:block;font-size:.875rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-trust__item small{font-size:.75rem;color:#64748b} .ft-categories,.ft-products,.ft-features,.ft-reviews{padding:64px 0} .ft-categories h2,.ft-products h2,.ft-features h2,.ft-reviews h2{font-family:'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;font-size:1.75rem;margin:0 0 28px;color:#0f172a} .ft-cat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px} .ft-cat{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;text-align:center} .ft-cat__img{aspect-ratio:4/5;border-radius:12px;background:#f8fafc;margin-bottom:10px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-cat span{font-weight:600;font-size:.875rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-section-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:24px;gap:12px} .ft-link{color:#0070f3;text-decoration:none;font-weight:600;font-size:.875rem} .ft-product-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:20px} .ft-product{border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:12px;padding:0 0 14px;background:#ffffff;overflow:hidden} .ft-product__img{aspect-ratio:1;background:#f8fafc} .ft-product h3{font-size:.9375rem;margin:12px 14px 4px;color:#0f172a} .ft-price{margin:0 14px 8px;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a} .ft-split{padding:64px 0;background:#f8fafc} .ft-split__inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:32px;align-items:center} .ft-split__visual{min-height:280px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#000000,#0070f3)} .ft-split__copy h2{font-family:'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;font-size:2rem;margin:8px 0 12px;color:#0f172a} .ft-split__copy p{color:#64748b;margin-bottom:20px} .ft-feature-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px} .ft-feature{padding:24px;border-radius:12px;background:#ffffff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-feature h3{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:1rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-feature p{margin:0;color:#64748b;font-size:.875rem} .ft-review-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px} .ft-review{margin:0;padding:20px;border-radius:12px;background:#ffffff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-review p{margin:0 0 12px;font-style:italic;color:#0f172a} .ft-review cite{font-size:.8125rem;color:#64748b;font-style:normal} .ft-newsletter{padding:64px 0} .ft-newsletter__box{text-align:center;padding:48px 32px;border-radius:12px;background:#000000;color:#fff} .ft-newsletter__box h2{font-family:'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;margin:0 0 8px;font-size:1.75rem} .ft-newsletter__box p{opacity:.85;margin:0 0 20px} .ft-newsletter__form{display:flex;gap:8px;max-width:440px;margin:0 auto;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center} .ft-newsletter__form input{flex:1;min-width:200px;padding:12px 16px;border-radius:999px;border:none;font-size:.875rem} .ft-footer{background:#000000;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);padding:48px 0 24px;margin-top:24px} .ft-footer__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:24px;margin-bottom:32px} .ft-footer__grid h4{margin:0 0 12px;font-size:.875rem;color:#fff} .ft-footer__grid a{display:block;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);text-decoration:none;font-size:.8125rem;margin-bottom:6px} .ft-footer__grid p{font-size:.8125rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);margin:8px 0 0} .ft-footer__bottom{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);padding-top:16px;font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55)} .ft-product{position:relative} .ft-product__badge{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;z-index:2;background:#0070f3;color:#fff;font-size:.6875rem;font-weight:700;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:999px} .ft-product__rating{font-size:.75rem;color:#f59e0b;margin:8px 14px 0} .ft-product__rating small{color:#64748b;font-weight:400} .ft-price-old{color:#64748b;font-size:.8125rem;font-weight:400;margin-left:6px} .ft-cat--rich small{display:block;font-size:.75rem;color:#64748b;margin-top:4px;font-weight:400} .ft-page-hero{padding:40px 0 32px;background:#f8fafc;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-page-hero h1{font-family:'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.75rem,3vw,2.5rem);margin:12px 0 8px;color:#0f172a} .ft-page-hero__sub{color:#64748b;max-width:560px;margin:0;line-height:1.6} .ft-breadcrumb{font-size:.8125rem;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;align-items:center} .ft-breadcrumb a{color:#0070f3;text-decoration:none} .ft-breadcrumb__sep{opacity:.5} .ft-filter-bar{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:24px} .ft-filter-chip{border:1px solid #e2e8f0;background:#ffffff;color:#0f172a;border-radius:999px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:.8125rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit} .ft-filter-chip--active{background:#000000;color:#fff;border-color:#000000} .ft-blog-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px} .ft-blog-card{border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:12px;padding:0 0 16px;background:#ffffff;overflow:hidden} .ft-blog-card__img{aspect-ratio:16/9;background:#f8fafc} .ft-blog-card .ft-eyebrow{margin:14px 16px 0;display:block} .ft-blog-card h3{font-size:1rem;margin:8px 16px;color:#0f172a} .ft-blog-card__excerpt{margin:0 16px 8px;font-size:.875rem;color:#64748b;line-height:1.5} .ft-blog-card__meta{margin:0 16px 10px;font-size:.75rem;color:#64748b} .ft-blog-card .ft-link{margin:0 16px} .ft-stats-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;text-align:center;padding:32px 0;margin:24px 0;border-block:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-stats-row strong{display:block;font-size:1.5rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-stats-row span{font-size:.8125rem;color:#64748b} .ft-contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .8fr;gap:32px;align-items:start} .ft-contact-info{padding:24px;border-radius:12px;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-contact-info h3{margin:0 0 16px;font-size:1rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-contact-info p{margin:0 0 12px;font-size:.875rem;color:#64748b;line-height:1.6} .ft-contact-form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px} .ft-contact-form input,.ft-contact-form textarea{padding:12px 16px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-family:inherit;font-size:.875rem;background:#ffffff;color:#0f172a} .ft-cart-panel{border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;background:#ffffff} .ft-cart-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:56px 1fr auto auto;gap:16px;align-items:center;padding:16px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-cart-row__thumb{width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:8px;background:#f8fafc} .ft-cart-row__info strong{display:block;font-size:.875rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-cart-row__info small{font-size:.75rem;color:#64748b} .ft-cart-row__qty{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px} .ft-cart-row__qty button{width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;color:#0f172a} .ft-cart-promo{display:flex;gap:8px;margin:20px 0} .ft-cart-promo input{flex:1;padding:10px 14px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-family:inherit} .ft-cart-summary div{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 0;font-size:.875rem;color:#64748b} .ft-cart-summary__total{font-size:1.0625rem;color:#0f172a;border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;margin-top:8px;padding-top:16px} .ft-cart-checkout{width:100%;margin-top:16px;text-align:center} .ft-cart-note{text-align:center;font-size:.75rem;color:#64748b;margin-top:12px} .ft-checkout-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 380px;gap:32px;align-items:start} .ft-checkout-form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px} .ft-checkout-form h3{margin:8px 0 4px;font-size:1rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-checkout-form input,.ft-checkout-form select{padding:12px 16px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-family:inherit;background:#ffffff;color:#0f172a} .ft-checkout-radio{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:.875rem;color:#64748b} .ft-checkout-card-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px} .ft-checkout-summary{border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;background:#f8fafc} .ft-checkout-summary h3{margin:0 0 16px;font-size:1.0625rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-checkout-summary__row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 0;font-size:.875rem;color:#64748b} .ft-checkout-summary__total{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:16px 0 0;margin-top:8px;border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:1.0625rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-checkout-pay{width:100%;margin-top:16px;text-align:center} .ft-checkout-trust{font-size:.75rem;color:#64748b;margin-top:12px;line-height:1.6;text-align:center} .ft-pagination{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;margin-top:32px} .ft-pagination button{min-width:40px;height:40px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;background:#ffffff;cursor:pointer;font-family:inherit;color:#0f172a} .ft-pagination button.ft-pagination__active{background:#000000;color:#fff;border-color:#000000} .ft-promo__link{color:#fff;margin-left:8px;text-decoration:underline;font-weight:700} .ft-header__inner{flex-wrap:wrap} .ft-header__search{flex:1;min-width:200px;max-width:360px;display:flex;align-items:center;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 6px 4px 16px} .ft-header__search input{flex:1;border:none;background:transparent;font-size:.875rem;outline:none;color:#0f172a;font-family:inherit} .ft-header__search-btn{border:none;background:#000000;color:#fff;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer} .ft-header__icon{text-decoration:none;font-size:1.125rem;padding:8px;color:#0f172a} .ft-header__cart{display:inline-flex;gap:6px;align-items:center} .ft-header__cart-count{background:#fff;color:#000000;font-size:.6875rem;font-weight:800;min-width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center} .ft-hero__photo,.ft-split__photo,.ft-cat__photo,.ft-blog-card__photo,.ft-gallery__photo,.ft-flash__img,.ft-contact-map__photo,.ft-cart-row__photo{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block} .ft-hero__visual{min-height:320px;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-hero__badges{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px} .ft-hero__badges span{font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;color:#64748b;background:#ffffff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:999px} .ft-hero--boutique .ft-hero__grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;text-align:center} .ft-hero--boutique .ft-hero__copy h1,.ft-hero--boutique .ft-hero__copy p{margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto} .ft-hero--boutique .ft-hero__cta,.ft-hero--boutique .ft-hero__badges{justify-content:center} .ft-hero--boutique .ft-hero__visual{max-width:760px;margin:28px auto 0} .ft-hero--compact{padding:48px 0} .ft-hero--compact .ft-hero__visual{min-height:240px} .ft-hero--compact .ft-hero__copy h1{font-size:clamp(1.75rem,3vw,2.75rem)} .ft-product__media{position:relative;overflow:hidden} .ft-product__img{aspect-ratio:1;width:100%;transition:transform .35s ease} .ft-product:hover .ft-product__img{transform:scale(1.04)} .ft-product__overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.35);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s} .ft-product:hover .ft-product__overlay{opacity:1} .ft-product__action{border:none;background:#fff;color:#0f172a;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:999px;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer} .ft-product__action--wish{width:36px;height:36px;padding:0;border-radius:50%} .ft-product__discount{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;z-index:2;background:#dc2626;color:#fff;font-size:.6875rem;font-weight:700;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px} .ft-product h3 a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none} .ft-product h3 a:hover{color:#0070f3} .ft-product__swatches{display:flex;gap:6px;margin:0 14px 6px} .ft-product__swatches span{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-installment{margin:0 14px 4px;font-size:.75rem;color:#0070f3;font-weight:600} .ft-product__stock{margin:0 14px 8px;font-size:.75rem;color:#16a34a} .ft-cat__img{position:relative;overflow:hidden} .ft-cat__count{position:absolute;bottom:8px;left:8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.65);color:#fff;font-size:.6875rem;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px} .ft-flash{padding:48px 0;background:#f8fafc} .ft-flash__inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:32px;align-items:center} .ft-flash__media{border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:4/3} .ft-flash__price{font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:800;color:#0f172a} .ft-flash__price s{font-size:1rem;color:#64748b;margin-left:8px;font-weight:400} .ft-countdown{display:flex;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 24px} .ft-countdown span{background:#ffffff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;font-size:.75rem;text-align:center} .ft-countdown b{display:block;font-size:1.25rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-brands{padding:28px 0;border-block:1px solid #e2e8f0;overflow:hidden} .ft-brands__item{display:inline-block;margin:0 28px;font-weight:800;font-size:.875rem;letter-spacing:.14em;color:#64748b;opacity:.7} .ft-brands{display:flex;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .ft-gallery{padding:64px 0} .ft-gallery__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:8px} .ft-gallery__item{border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:1} .ft-review__head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px} .ft-review__avatar{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover} .ft-review__stars{display:block;font-size:.75rem;color:#f59e0b} .ft-team-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:24px;text-align:center} .ft-team-card__photo{width:120px;height:120px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;margin:0 auto 12px} .ft-team-card span{display:block;font-size:.8125rem;color:#64748b} .ft-shop-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:260px 1fr;gap:32px;align-items:start} .ft-shop-sidebar{position:sticky;top:88px} .ft-shop-filter{margin-bottom:24px;padding-bottom:20px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-shop-filter h3{margin:0 0 12px;font-size:.875rem;color:#0f172a} .ft-shop-filter ul{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0} .ft-shop-filter li{margin-bottom:6px} .ft-shop-filter a{color:#64748b;text-decoration:none;font-size:.8125rem} .ft-shop-filter a:hover{color:#0070f3} .ft-range input{width:100%} .ft-range__labels{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:.75rem;color:#64748b;margin-top:6px} .ft-size-grid,.ft-color-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .ft-size-grid button{width:36px;height:36px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;background:#ffffff;cursor:pointer;font-size:.75rem;font-family:inherit;color:#0f172a} .ft-size-grid button.is-active,.ft-size-grid button.active{outline:2px solid #0070f3;background:#f8fafc;font-weight:700} .ft-color-swatch{width:32px;height:32px;min-width:32px;min-height:32px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #e2e8f0;padding:0;margin:0;cursor:pointer;display:inline-block;font-size:0;line-height:0;overflow:hidden;color:transparent} .ft-color-swatch--black{background:#0f172a} .ft-color-swatch--red{background:#dc2626} .ft-color-swatch--blue{background:#2563eb} .ft-color-swatch--white{background:#f8fafc;border-color:#cbd5e1} .ft-color-swatch--green{background:#16a34a} .ft-color-swatch--beige{background:#d6c4a8} .ft-color-swatch.is-active,.ft-color-swatch.active{outline:2px solid #0070f3;outline-offset:2px} .ft-product__swatches .ft-color-swatch{width:14px;height:14px;min-width:14px;min-height:14px;border-width:1px;cursor:default} .ft-shop-check{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:.8125rem;color:#64748b;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:8px} .ft-shop-check input{accent-color:#0070f3} .ft-shop-filter__apply{width:100%;margin-top:8px} .ft-shop-toolbar{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:16px;padding-bottom:16px;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0} .ft-shop-results{margin:0;font-size:.875rem;color:#64748b} .ft-shop-results strong{color:#0f172a} .ft-shop-toolbar__actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px} .ft-shop-sort{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:.8125rem;color:#64748b} .ft-shop-sort select{padding:8px 12px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;background:#ffffff;color:#0f172a;font-family:inherit;font-size:.8125rem} .ft-shop-view{display:flex;gap:4px} .ft-shop-view button{width:36px;height:36px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;background:#ffffff;cursor:pointer;color:#64748b;font-size:1rem} .ft-shop-view button.is-active{background:#000000;color:#fff;border-color:#000000} .ft-product-grid--shop{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:20px} .ft-products--shop{padding:32px 0 64px} .ft-shop-trust{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;margin-top:28px;padding-top:20px;border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:.75rem;color:#64748b} .ft-shop-trust span{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px} .ft-sort{font-size:.875rem;color:#64748b} .ft-contact-map{margin-top:20px;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:16/9} .ft-footer__extras{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px;padding:20px 0;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);margin-bottom:8px} .ft-footer__payments{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)} .ft-pay-badge{background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;font-size:.6875rem} .ft-footer__social{display:flex;gap:16px} .ft-footer__social a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none;font-size:.8125rem} .ft-footer__apps{opacity:.7} .ft-split__list{margin:0 0 20px;padding-left:18px;color:#64748b;font-size:.875rem;line-height:1.8} .ft-blog-card h3 a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none} .ft-blog-card h3 a:hover{color:#0070f3} @media(max-width:992px){.ft-hero__grid,.ft-split__inner,.ft-contact-grid,.ft-flash__inner,.ft-shop-layout,.ft-checkout-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}.ft-header__search{order:3;flex:1 1 100%;max-width:none}.ft-cat-grid,.ft-product-grid,.ft-blog-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.ft-product-grid--shop{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.ft-gallery__grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}.ft-trust__grid,.ft-feature-grid,.ft-review-grid,.ft-footer__grid,.ft-stats-row,.ft-team-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.ft-cart-row{grid-template-columns:48px 1fr;grid-template-rows:auto auto}.ft-cart-row__qty,.ft-cart-row__price{grid-column:2}.ft-shop-sidebar{position:static}} @media(max-width:640px){.ft-nav{display:none}.ft-cat-grid,.ft-product-grid,.ft-blog-grid,.ft-gallery__grid,.ft-product-grid--shop,.ft-trust__grid,.ft-feature-grid,.ft-review-grid,.ft-footer__grid,.ft-stats-row,.ft-team-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

faq.html:
Yıllık planlarda 2 ay bedava — kod: DIGITAL2026 Detaylar →
DAWN
Ürünler Koleksiyonlar Blog Hakkımızda İletişim
👤 ♡ Sepet 2
Ana Sayfa/SSS

Sık sorulan sorular

Sipariş, kargo, iade ve ödeme hakkında merak ettikleriniz.

Siparişim ne zaman kargoya verilir?

Stoktaki ürünler aynı gün veya en geç 1 iş günü içinde kargoya verilir. Hafta sonu verilen siparişler pazartesi işleme alınır.

Kargo ne kadar sürer?

1–3 iş günü içinde adresinize teslim edilir. Büyükşehirlerde çoğu sipariş ertesi gün ulaşır.

İade nasıl yapılır?

14 gün içinde kullanılmamış ürünleri ücretsiz iade kargo kodu ile gönderebilirsiniz. İade onayından sonra 3–5 iş günü içinde ödeme iadesi yapılır.

Ödeme güvenli mi?

Tüm ödemeler 256-bit SSL ile şifrelenir. Kredi kartı, banka kartı, havale/EFT ve kapıda ödeme seçenekleri mevcuttur.

Ücretsiz kargo şartı nedir?

500 ₺ ve üzeri siparişlerde kargo ücretsizdir. Kampanya dönemlerinde eşik tutar değişebilir.

Ürün orijinal mi?

Tüm ürünler yetkili distribütörlerden temin edilir. Sahte veya muadil ürün satışı yapılmaz.

Fatura kesiliyor mu?

Kurumsal ve bireysel e-fatura/e-arşiv fatura otomatik olarak e-postanıza gönderilir.

Canlı destek var mı?

7/24 canlı chat, WhatsApp ve telefon destek hattımız aktiftir. Ortalama yanıt süresi 2 dakikadır.

Sorunuz mu var? Bize yazın →
